reviews.comment:
El personal siempre muy atento y muy bien
Los Baños siempre sucios porque me imagino que no alcanza el personal. Si venís de la frontera imposible llegar muy mal camino, yo creo que lo hicieron a propósito para que no vayas. Eso es una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were always very attentive and helpful. However, the bathrooms were always dirty, probably because they don't have enough staff. If you're coming from the border, it's impossible to get there; the road is terrible. I think they did it on purpose to discourage people from going. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xaeVdrazFhVmxEZEhOUExXSlhVVnBMV0haSE0xRRAB
